about.title: About the Tutor
about.desc: I am an English tutor with over 10 years of experience. My goal is to help you learn English in a practical and effective way. Using modern techniques, I make your learning journey shorter and more enjoyable.

items.exp: Over 10 years of specialized teaching experience

loginRequired.title: Login Required

results.title: Congratulations!
results.desc: Based on your answers in this comprehensive test, your level has been determined. You can now use the appropriate educational content.
tips: Study English for at least 30 minutes daily
Use educational content relevant to your level
Participate in group or private classes
Regularly watch educational podcasts and videos
